driving_license_description_family_name: Last name, surname, or primary identifier, of the mDL holder.

driving_license_description_given_name_n: The given name of the mDL holder

driving_license_description_domestic_dri: Vehicle types the license holder is authorized to operate
driving_license_description_name_suffix: Name suffix of the individual that has been issued the driver license or identification document.
driving_license_description_organ_donor: An indicator that denotes whether the credential holder is an organ donor.
driving_license_description_veteran: An indicator that denotes whether the credential holder is a veteran.

driving_license_description_given_name_t: A code that indicates whether either the first name or the middle name(s) have been truncated

driving_license_description_alias_given_: Other given name by which credential holder is known.
driving_license_description_alias_suffix: Other suffix by which credential holder is known.
driving_license_description_weight_range: Indicates the approximate weight range of the cardholder
driving_license_description_race_ethnici: Codes for race or ethnicity of the cardholder
driving_license_description_compliance_t: DHS required field that indicates compliance

driving_license_description_resident_cou: The 3-digit county code of the county where the mDL holder lives

driving_license_description_biometric_te: Facial biometric information of the mDL holder

driving_license_description_aamva_versio: A number identifying the version of the AAMVA mDL data element set
